old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-58on","title":"Zephyr fuel_gauge.h header triggers sign-compare with LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS","description":"The power_providers test variant fails to build because Zephyr's fuel_gauge.h header (lines 299, 352) has sign comparison warnings that become errors with LICHEN's -Werror flag.

Error: comparison of integer expressions of different signedness in z_impl_fuel_gauge_get_props and z_impl_fuel_gauge_set_props.

Options:
1. Add -Wno-error=sign-compare to LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS
2. Wrap fuel_gauge.h include with pragma to suppress warning
3. Upstream a fix to Zephyr

Related to hal/lichen.hal.power_providers test.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T05:46:37.376052Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T05:46:37.376099Z","labels":["bug","build","hal"]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-58on","title":"Zephyr fuel_gauge.h header triggers sign-compare with LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS","description":"The power_providers test variant fails to build because Zephyr's fuel_gauge.h header (lines 299, 352) has sign comparison warnings that become errors with LICHEN's -Werror flag.

Error: comparison of integer expressions of different signedness in z_impl_fuel_gauge_get_props and z_impl_fuel_gauge_set_props.

Options:
1. Add -Wno-error=sign-compare to LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS
2. Wrap fuel_gauge.h include with pragma to suppress warning
3. Upstream a fix to Zephyr

Related to hal/lichen.hal.power_providers test.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T05:46:37.376052Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:08:48.144474844Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:08:48.144474844Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:48.144474844Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:08:48.144474844Z","labels":["bug","build","hal"]}
new_value: {"notes":"Added explicit #include \u003czephyr/drivers/fuel_gauge.h\u003e inside the pragma block in lichen/tests/hal/src/main.c to ensure z_impl_fuel_gauge_* sign-compare warnings are suppressed for power_providers test variant. Commit hash: 9bb4ec235. Test variant now builds cleanly. Related to prior scoped pragma work in hal.c and project-LICHEN-4chk."}
Pragma now explicitly covers fuel_gauge.h include; power_providers variant builds without sign-compare error. Commit 9bb4ec235 recorded.
